title: 安田記念の後に・確かな異変

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokyo Racecourse rumbles with the sound of
thunderous applause after the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Members
text_block_list.text: Ready? Aaand... Good job, Fujiii!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Look, I got a really good video of her running!
I've gotta post it ASAP!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Her next race is going to be the autumn Tenno
Sho, right? I'll have to take the day off to watch
it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The whole world believes in Fuji Kiseki's skills and
expects great things from her in the next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The air buzzes with excitement, but I'm troubled
by something I noticed during the race.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff! Puff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I didn't watch her run literally every day, I might
have missed it, but something was off about her
running.
choice_data_list: (Something's wrong with her. I just know it.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hurry to the runners' tunnel to catch up with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She left already. Mentioned wantin' to fine-tune
somethin' or other.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She told me to make up some excuse for her so
you wouldn't worry.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She and I aren't exactly strangers, bein' fellow
dorm leaders and all, so...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to think I know her fairly well. Is somethin'
up with her?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Knew it... Don't think she'll spill the beans to me,
though.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Guess you're the only one who can get anythin'
from her. It's up to you now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush back to the school, hoping I can catch up to
Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next race will be the medium-distance
autumn Tenno Sho. But, before that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I have to find out what's wrong with Fuji Kiseki!
